core_content.image_object_context: Abstract, futuristic visualization of AI automation enhancing a small business, perhaps with glowing data streams connecting various business functions. The style should be professional yet accessible, conveying efficiency and growth.

Illustration of a diverse small business owner looking empowered while interacting with an automated system on a tablet. The system shows simplified charts for sales and customer service. Clean, modern, and optimistic visual style.
